author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for three additional services under the ServiceRegistry framework (already shipped in 815230c): LspManager, RemoteConfig (Claude Code feature-flag bundles), ExtractMemories worker. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: each is a multi-day feature. LspManager has its own family of tickets (#535 spec, #636 server pool, #638 diagnostics registry, #640 passive feedback, #643/#644/#645/#651 LSPTool ops). ExtractMemories ties to memdir (#508/#533). RemoteConfig has no implementation prerequisite but requires GrowthBook-shaped feature-flag client design. Tracked individually.
